items.name: harmonist
items.description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.

items.name: OpenViking
items.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: executor
items.description: The missing integration layer for AI agents. Let them call any OpenAPI / MCP / GraphQL / custom js functions in secure environment.

items.name: memex
items.description: Open-source, local-first AI journal app for iOS and Android. Capture text, photos, and voice — AI agents organize them into timeline cards and insights. Your data stays on your device. Bring your own LLM (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, and more).

items.name: todoist-mcp
items.description: A set of tools to connect to AI agents, to allow them to use Todoist on a user's behalf. Includes MCP support.

items.name: clawvisor
items.description: API gateway for purpose-based authorization for AI agents. Human approval for tasks, AI-native enforcement for agents.

items.name: powermem
items.description: PowerMem: AI Memory Plugin— Accurate, Agile, Affordable. Make AI Agent smarter.

items.name: oh-my-agent
items.description: Portable, vendor-agnostic agent harness for project-specific skills, workflows, and agent teams aligned with your codebase, conventions, and engineering standards.

items.name: llm-agents-from-scratch
items.description: Build LLM agents and multi-agent systems from scratch, with MCP, Skills, and A2A

items.name: jiuwenswarm
items.description: JiuwenSwarm is an intelligent AI Agent built on openJiuwen. It extends the powerful capabilities of large language models directly to your fingertips through various communication apps you use daily.
